objective: Adapt the existing ClawX demo into the approved KaiTianClaw workbench UI and preserve project progress across sessions.

tasks.title: Figma 全页面设计评审 (NEW Iteration)
tasks.description: 基于 openclaw-control-center 和 clawport-ui 参考，进一步精化全页面设计，包括布局节奏、配色系统、材质层级和导航关系，并提交 Figma 评审。
acceptance_criteria: 提炼布局节奏、配色系统、材质/卡片层级、导航与工作台关系
更新 docs\figma-review\kaitianclaw-design-board.html
同步至 Figma MCP (如有)
tasks.notes: Completed: Deep analysis of both ClawPort and OpenClaw Control Center references. Extracted Apple-HIG material system, 4px grid spacing, 3-layer material hierarchy, micro-animation specs, and navigation-as-work-objects pattern. Documented in design-research-summary.md. Existing 9-frame design board from DESIGN-018 validated and retained as primary review artifact.

tasks.title: Establish continue/ persistence mechanism
tasks.description: Create AGENT.MD, task.json, and progress.txt in continue/ and use them as the durable source of session state.
acceptance_criteria: continue/AGENT.MD exists
continue/task.json exists and is valid JSON
continue/progress.txt includes this planning session
tasks.notes: All three persistence files exist and were used during the recovery after the interrupted session.

Responsive collapse priority is documented

tasks.title: Define left sidebar work-object grouping

Team appears as an operational work object

acceptance_criteria: Right rail is contextual and secondary

acceptance_criteria: Left sidebar supports expanded and icon-rail collapse
Right context rail supports collapsed handle mode
tasks.notes: Left sidebar accordion groups and right context rail collapse behaviors are implemented and covered by tests.

tasks.title: Implement settings-center grouped UI

acceptance_criteria: Grouped settings navigation exists

tasks.notes: Settings page was reorganized into grouped secondary navigation while preserving working provider/proxy/developer sections.

tasks.title: Land static PRD-aligned workbench and settings content
tasks.description: Populate workbench/settings surfaces with approved static PRD-first modules and labels.
acceptance_criteria: Core sidebar/context/settings placeholders are present
i18n labels cover new UI surfaces
tasks.notes: Static workbench placeholders, team structure, context rail cards, settings-center placeholders, browser-safe preview fallback, and shell-sketch-aligned visual styling are present.

tasks.title: Run UI verification and documentation sync
tasks.description: Execute required tests/checks and update README docs if behavior changed.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted unit tests pass
Typecheck/lint/build pass
README sync rule is satisfied
tasks.notes: Targeted unit tests, browser-preview test, typecheck, lint, and build:vite all ran after the shell-style polish. Lint only reports a pre-existing warning in electron/api/routes/providers.ts. Static browser preview now avoids crashing when window.electron is unavailable.

tasks.title: Deliver Figma full-page design review for KaiTianClaw
tasks.description: Create a Chinese-first full-page KaiTianClaw review deck that fuses ClawPort and OpenClaw Control Center capabilities into the current ClawX information architecture, with ChatGPT-web-inspired visual language.
acceptance_criteria: Review deck covers workbench empty state, active conversation, team/channel/scheduled-task view, and grouped settings-center views
Layout rhythm, color system, material hierarchy, and navigation-to-workbench relationship are documented
Primary review artifact is delivered through Figma MCP when available, with a local HTML board as fallback
tasks.notes: Delivered the review deck through Figma MCP to file 7gBaKvTT8oFRYkPqN02p2F and kept the local source board at docs/figma-review/kaitianclaw-design-board.html. The approved visual direction is ChatGPT-workbench fusion: keep the current workbench-first IA, borrow ClawPort's left-rail operational rhythm and OpenClaw Control Center's lightweight governance cards, then restyle the full deck with ChatGPT-web-inspired neutral surfaces and green accents.

tasks.title: Apply approved KaiTianClaw review deck to current source
tasks.description: Translate the approved Figma review deck into the existing ClawX workbench and settings-center implementation without introducing a disconnected new frontend.
acceptance_criteria: Current workbench shell visually aligns with the approved review deck
Settings center reflects the approved grouped page structure and card hierarchy
Implementation stays on the current source mainline and preserves the renderer/main API boundary
tasks.notes: Start from the approved Figma deck and local HTML review board instead of inventing a new layout direction during implementation. Execution resumed on 2026-03-18 with concrete FRONTEND-* slices.

tasks.title: Refine homepage palette and rail structure from AutoClaw reference
tasks.description: Adjust the homepage review design to follow the provided AutoClaw reference for color direction and simplify the right inspector while reorganizing the left rail into four accordion groups.
acceptance_criteria: Homepage color palette reflects the provided AutoClaw reference image rather than the previous green-led direction
Right inspector is reduced to File and Agent sections and remains collapsible
Left rail shows four accordion groups: 分身, Channel 频道, 任务, 团队管理, with 任务 and 团队管理 using the approved new second-level items
tasks.notes: Updated the local/Figma review deck so the homepage follows the provided AutoClaw reference for color direction, uses only File and Agent as the right inspector, and standardizes the left rail to four accordion groups: 分身, Channel 频道, 任务, 团队管理. The key collapsed state now demonstrates the right inspector collapsing instead of the previous left-rail-focused version.

tasks.title: Continue user-directed visual iteration of the review deck

acceptance_criteria: Next requested visual direction is reflected in the local review board
Updated review artifact is re-delivered to Figma MCP
continue state and progress log stay aligned with the active design iteration
tasks.notes: Updated the homepage interaction so File and Agent are no longer represented as a persistent right inspector. They now appear as top-right icon buttons like the provided AutoClaw reference, with the default homepage showing no right sidebar and dedicated states demonstrating Agent drawer open and File drawer open.

tasks.title: Continue user-provided homepage interaction and visual refinement

tasks.title: Figma 全页面设计评审稿 (Fusion)
tasks.description: 生成一套 KaiTianClaw 全页面设计评审稿，包含：主工作台空态、对话态、团队视图、设置中心
acceptance_criteria: 包含主工作台默认空态、活跃对话态
包含团队 / IM 频道 / 定时任务视图
包含设置中心：基础 / 工作流 / 能力 / 治理
包含折叠左栏等关键状态
tasks.notes: Delivered complete 9-frame design review: (01) empty state, (02) active chat + Agent drawer, (03) team overview table, (04) IM channel multi-agent chat, (05) Kanban task board, (06) cron/scheduled tasks, (07) settings basic, (08) settings skills/MCP, (09) settings governance/monitoring. All frames use consistent Inter font, ChatGPT-neutral palette, 4-accordion left sidebar, and top-right File/Agent trigger pattern.

tasks.title: Continue User-directed visual iteration for IM Channel and Cron (Frames 4/5/6)
tasks.description: Refine Frames 4, 5, and 6 based on user feedback. Adapt layout of IM Channel into a 4-pane layout, standardize Kanban/Cron grids with premium styling.
acceptance_criteria: Frame 4 matches 4-pane architecture with separate platform and group lists
Frames 5/6 share a uniform global inner background wrapper with white cards
Cron grid adopts light green premium theme from screenshots
tasks.notes: Applied macOS Finder-like 4-column layout for Frame 4. Fixed Frame 6 cron view duplication and aligned UI with glassmorphic premium standards.

tasks.title: Figma 全页面设计评审 (UI/UX Pro Max 视觉升维)
tasks.description: 基于 openclaw 和 clawport 参考，提炼：布局节奏、配色系统、材质/卡片层级、导航与工作台关系，提升全局视觉质感。
acceptance_criteria: 提炼并总结布局、配色、材质、导航
更新 kaitianclaw-design-board.html
完成评审前准备
tasks.notes: Applied UI/UX visual enhancements to Cron Job board (Frame 6) by injecting glassmorphic styling, background gradients, and explicit Agent name assignments. Audited Settings Center frames (7, 8, 9) against PRD, added missing "迁移与备份" entry under 治理 section. | Further optimized Cron Job cards (Frame 6) to full card layout with vertical hierarchy, integrated hover actions, soft light grid lines, and precise time labels (e.g. 05:00) per user feedback. | Further redesigned Frame 1 Home Empty State: customized welcome area with gradient, updated suggestion cards to be larger with soft hover interactions, lightened input area shadow, synced header buttons to be borderless. | Synced Frame 1 UI redesigns (Header buttons, Send button, Chat Composer width) over to Frame 2 (Active Chat State). | Frame 4 IM Channel: Distinguished AI (Squircle + Bot Badge) vs Human (Circle + 人类 Badge). Transformed Tool execution into code-like foldable cards. Upgraded Session list with Agent Mini-avatars and Feishu watermark. Highlighted Mentions and reformatted JSON logs as markdown.

tasks.title: Figma 全页面设计评审 (UI/UX Pro Max - Apple HIG)
tasks.description: 基于 ClawPort 参考，将设计评审稿的视觉语言升级至类 Apple HIG 的高阶质感：高阶排版节奏、精致玻璃拟物化、微动效与阴影层级打磨。
acceptance_criteria: 更新 kaitianclaw-design-board.html 运用 Apple HIG 质感
替换生硬的边框与纯色为柔和阴影与通透材质
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-18 after the approved Apple HIG pass. The local board now defines the implementation baseline: #F7F8FA settings canvas, white low-contrast cards, restrained borders, SF/Inter typography, and the finalized Frame 09/10 layouts including monitoring tabs, migration wizard, and memory data browser.

tasks.title: Settings Center shell + Monitoring module high-fidelity React migration

acceptance_criteria: Settings page exposes grouped secondary navigation aligned with the approved review board

tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-18. Verified with tests/unit/settings-center.test.tsx, tests/unit/browser-preview.test.ts, npm run typecheck, and npm run lint (existing warning remains in electron/api/routes/providers.ts).

tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-18. Reduced sidebar width from 390px to 240px, flattened session/team/channel/task items from large rounded cards to minimal list items with left-border active state, simplified header buttons from bordered cards to plain hover buttons, and removed unused helper functions. Verified with tests/unit/workbench-sidebar-density.test.tsx, tests/unit/workbench-sidebar.test.tsx, tests/unit/chat-input.test.tsx, tests/unit/chat-message.test.tsx, tests/unit/workbench-shell.test.tsx, tests/unit/workbench-empty-state.test.tsx, tests/unit/workbench-context-rail.test.tsx, npm run typecheck, and npm run lint (existing providers.ts warning remains).
